# Scoring Zone

> Golf short game practice app with scored drills, pressure tests, and performance tracking.

Scoring Zone turns golf short game practice into scored, structured challenges. Built by a 3-handicap golfer with 25 years on the course.

## What Scoring Zone Does

- Scored putting drills with benchmarks (ladder putting, gate drills, pressure tests)
- Scored chipping and wedge drills for every short game situation
- Performance tracking with stats, streaks, and XP progression
- SIM Lab for simulating tournament pressure in practice
- AI-powered practice assistant that builds custom routines
- Elite Mode with tour-level analytics and strokes gained

## Who It's For

- Golfers trying to break 90, 80, or scratch
- Beginners who want structured practice
- High handicappers focused on scoring improvement
- Junior golfers learning the short game
- Senior golfers maximising their scoring ability
- Competitive golfers training under pressure

## Pricing

Free during early access. No credit card required.
